title: Test Forest Sentinel: 109-E01 NEGATE_ATTACK_AND_REFLECT_DAMAGE

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent finishes their attack. Negate the attack and return the damage back at the attacking creature.

plan.title: Test Forest Sentinel: 109-E01 NEGATE_ATTACK_AND_REFLECT_DAMAGE
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Forest Sentinel and verify that 109-E01 NEGATE_ATTACK_AND_REFLECT_DAMAGE resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

forcedRolls.label: Forest Sentinel QA: stable attack damage

notes: Rules text: play from hand when your opponent finishes their attack; negate the attack and return the damage back at the attacking creature.
Player 2 attacks; Player 1 responds from hand after the attack finishes.

steps: Player 1 plays Forest Sentinel from hand at the attack-finished response window.
Verify the attack is negated and damage is reflected to the attacker.
manualVerification: Confirm the reflected damage amount matches the attack damage that would have been dealt.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
